Job search supportStudent has been applying for graduate roles for three months without success. We reviewed their approach — applications were broad and CV wasn't being tailored. Agreed a more focused strategy targeting 5–8 roles in the sustainability sector. Discussed how to use LinkedIn to identify contacts at target employers.
